title: Bit's Delight
description: More food to Minecraft. This mod is not an addon for Farmers Delight
body:
## Join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/Dp3em7Z6Ku)!

This mod adds new foods variations into minecraft, and it only can be crafted using minecraft vanilla items

### Current Items:

- Cup - Used for new types of drinks.

- Flour - Ingredient for recipes.

- Dough - Usefull ingredient.

- Chocolate Dough - Like dough but made with cocoa.

- Dulce de Leche Crudo - Tasty ingredient.

- Pan Rallado - Bread Crumbles, basically

- Kneading Stick - Could have other mechanichs in a future update.

### Foods/Drinks:

- Dulce de Leche - Tasty sweet.

- Chicken Beef - Just a raw beef made of chicken.

- Raw Milanesa - Yeah, raw one.

- Milanesa - A tasty chicken beef with pan rallado.

- Chocolate Bread - Bread but made with chocolate doughs.

- Apple Tea - It will make you feel better, and you will feel like a feather (Regeneration II / Slow Falling)

- Alfajor - Tasty dulce de leche and chocolate cookie-like food.

- Dark Coffee - One type of coffee that makes you feel Stronger! (Strenght II / Regeneration)

- Coffee - A variant from the Dark Coffee, it will make you can mine everything (Haste II / Regeneration)

- Churro - A classic.

- Chocolate Churro - A Type of churro with chocolate in the top.

- Dulce de Leche Churro - Like chocolate one but with dulce de leche.

- Chocolate and Dulce de Leche Churro - A mix of two churros with a nice and special flavor. (Resistance II  / Absortion IV)

- Chocolated Beetroot - A New food... Not very good to eat (Nauseas / Hunger)

- Ice Palette - A Good nice food, made with ice and snow, like, just water. (Night Vision / Absorption)

- Ice Cream Bucket - A Cone, but in bucket form.

- Chocolate Ice Cream - A Cool new food, need to be created in a ice cream bucket. (Night Vision / Jump Boost)

- Watermelon Ice Cream - A new food, like the chocolate ice cream but made from watermelon. (Night Vision / Jump Boost)

- Chocolate - The classic chocolate bar
